events.label: Manual Ad Hoc Audit
events.trigger: Used when a human explicitly requests a one-off harness audit.
events.recommended_scope: Current branch or local repository state
events.notes: Default fallback when no cadence event is provided.

events.label: Weekly Baseline Audit
events.trigger: Run once per week for the default branch or active harness branch.
events.recommended_scope: Current canonical workflow stack plus representative workpack samples

events.label: Slice Batch Review
events.trigger: Run after every 3-5 merged slices or equivalent engineering milestones.
events.recommended_scope: Recent merged slices, current OMO tracked state, and closeout surfaces
events.notes: Used to catch accumulated drift after a chunk of delivery work.

events.label: In-Flight Slice Checkpoint
events.trigger: Run at Stage 2, Stage 4, and Stage 6 checkpoints for OMO pilot slices such as slice06.
events.recommended_scope: Checkpoint evidence, workpack docs, .workflow-v2 status, and OMO runtime artifacts
events.notes: Audits harness/runtime evidence around an in-flight slice, not product correctness itself.

events.label: OMO Promotion Gate
events.trigger: Run before any proposal to make OMO v2 the default workflow path.
events.recommended_scope: Full workflow stack including promotion blockers and representative pilot evidence
events.notes: Required gate before v1/v2 cutover decisions.
